_instructions.landing_pages: Optional long-form content for service landings. service_id must match a services.json id/slug.
_instructions.service_id: Links this landing to a service for routing and schema.
_instructions.sections: Content blocks under the hero. Each needs headline, paragraphs and image.
_instructions.slug: URL path segment under /services/{slug}. Must be unique.

landing_pages.name: Masonry
landing_pages.meta_title: Masonry Contractor in Virginia Beach | Example Masonry & Hardscape
landing_pages.meta_description: Professional masonry services in Virginia Beach: brick, stone, fireplaces and custom outdoor features.

hero.headline: Expert Masonry for Homes That Stand Out
hero.paragraph: From outdoor fireplaces to custom stone accents, our masonry crew delivers craftsmanship built for coastal Virginia weather.
hero.image_alt: Custom masonry fireplace and seating wall

sections.headline: Brick, Stone and Block Done Right
paragraphs: We select materials that match your architecture and local climate, then install with proper reinforcement and drainage details.
Whether you need a fireplace, outdoor kitchen surround or decorative columns, we keep the finish clean and structural integrity first.

cta.headline: Ready for a free masonry estimate?

landing_pages.name: Hardscape
landing_pages.meta_title: Hardscape Contractor in Virginia Beach | Example Masonry & Hardscape
landing_pages.meta_description: Hardscape design and installation for walkways, fire pits, seating walls and outdoor rooms.

hero.headline: Hardscape Design Built for Everyday Living
hero.paragraph: We create outdoor spaces that feel intentional — walkways, seating walls, fire features and full outdoor rooms.

sections.headline: Function First, Then Finish
paragraphs: Good hardscaping starts with how you use the yard: traffic flow, gathering spaces and maintenance.
We combine durable materials with clean edges and drainage so the space stays usable after every storm.
